title: QA: Verify hash verification integration tests
intent: Verify that the hash verification integration tests are meaningful — they must exercise the real ModuleLoader code path, not mocks, and must fail for the right reason.
acceptance_criteria: Tests exercise ModuleLoader.load() (not a mocked version)
Hash mismatch rejection produces a specific, diagnosable error (not a generic failure)
Tests are deterministic — same input always produces same outcome
No regressions in existing module-loader tests
